command.wynnventory.send.sendCollectedDa: Sent all collected items to the Wynnventory API.
feature.wynnventory.disabled.betaOnRelea: Beta versions may not be used on live servers. This Wynnventory version is disabled on this server.
feature.wynnventory.disabled.frumaIncomp: Wynnventory does not yet support Fruma. All features have been disabled. Check our Discord for any news.
feature.wynnventory.disabled.releaseOnBe: Release versions may not be used on beta servers. This Wynnventory version is disabled on this server. Check our Discord for any beta release.
Boxed Item Tooltips are now disabled
Boxed Item Tooltips are now enabled
feature.wynnventory.tooltip.title: Trade Market Price Info
feature.wynnventory.update.betaNotificat: This is a beta build. Skipping update check...
feature.wynnventory.update.notifyUserOfD: Download completed! Restart Minecraft to apply the update.
feature.wynnventory.update.notifyUserOfU: New version available: %s. Attempting to auto-update...
Successfully downloaded %s. Please restart Minecraft to apply the update.
gui.wynnventory.settings.highlighting.co: The minimum market value an item must have to be highlighted.
gui.wynnventory.settings.highlighting.he: Manually enter a color in HEX format (e.g. #FF5555).
gui.wynnventory.settings.highlighting.hi: Use the slider to choose the highlight color.
gui.wynnventory.settings.highlighting.sh:
On: Highlight item prices if above the defined threshold .
Off: Disable price highlighting.
gui.wynnventory.settings.notifications.e:
On: Show notifications on server join when favorited items are found in any lootpool.
Off: Disable all notifications.
gui.wynnventory.settings.notifications.m: The maximum number of notification to display (1-20).

On: Only notify for Mythic items.
Off: Notify for all favorited items.
gui.wynnventory.settings.prediction.show:
On: Show how each stat affects the predicted price.
Off: Hide contributing factors.

On: Show a predicted market value based on item stats.
Off: Hide price prediction.
gui.wynnventory.settings.rewardscreen.la:
Default: Carousel style showing one pool at a time.
Compact: Grid style showing all pools at once.
gui.wynnventory.settings.rewardscreen.ma: The maximum number of loot pools to show at once in the reward screen (1-10).
gui.wynnventory.settings.title: Wynnventory Settings
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.anchorT:
On: Anchor tooltips to the side of the screen.
Off: Attach tooltips to the item tooltip.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.display:
Formatted: Show as formatted price.
Raw: Show price as emeralds.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.priceDe:
Minimal: Show only the lowest price.
Standard: Show lowest price and moving median.
Detailed: Show lowest, moving median, and 80% average.
Custom: Manually select which metrics to show.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.separat:
On: Configure price metrics for identified and unidentified items separately.
Off: Show the same metrics for both.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.showAve:
On: Show the average price of todays listings excluding the top and bottom 10%.
Off: Hide 80% average price.

On: Show the arithmetic mean of all listings placed today for an item.
Off: Hide average price.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.showBox:
On: Show prices for boxed items.
Off: Don't show prices for boxed items.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.showMax:
On: Show the highest price listed today.
Off: Hide max price.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.showMed:
On: Show the median price of all items listed today.
Off: Hide median price.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.showMin:
On: Show the lowest price listed today.
Off: Hide lowest price.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.showMov:
On: Show a smoothed median.
Off: Hide moving median.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.showPri:
On: Show the 24-hour price change percentage.
Off: Hide price fluctuation.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.showToo:
On: Show price tooltips on items.
Off: Hide price tooltips.
gui.wynnventory.settings.tooltip.showUni:
On: Show the 80% average for unidentified items.
Off: Hide unid 80% average.

On: Show the average price for unidentified items.
Off: Hide unid average price.

On: Show the highest price for unidentified items.
Off: Hide unid max price.

On: Show the median price for unidentified items.
Off: Hide unid median price.

On: Show the lowest price for unidentified items.
Off: Hide unid lowest price.

On: Show a smoothed median for unidentified items.
Off: Hide unid moving median.
